summary: Richer Notes preview, folder counts, and a smoother Music search experience with artwork and catalog playback.

changed: Notes preview renders markdown in a styled HTML viewer with headings, lists, code blocks, and links
Notes and Passwords filter shows colored count badges — blue for notes, orange for passwords
Music search results scroll properly, show album artwork, and include a play button on each row
Apple Music catalog results play through MusicKit; library matches still fall back to the Music app
fixed: Music workspace no longer jumps to the top after searching, and library search no longer activates Music.app in front of Nucleus
